calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Deborah B. Honig, Esq. for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's Witness: Wah-Mei Lew and Oliver Luby, were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Rebecca Reynolds Silverberg aka Rebecca L. Silverberg aka Rebecca L. Reynolds as requested.
Ms. Honig to prepare Judgment.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-05-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Continued To Jul-06-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
